name: What mistakes to avoid after bad AI referral in Chicago?
description: Preserve evidence, stay silent, hire lawyer now in IL.

mainEntity.name: What mistakes to avoid after bad AI referral in Chicago?

acceptedAnswer.text: Preserve evidence, stay silent, hire lawyer now in IL.
acceptedAnswer.description: Don't delete records, talk to insurers, or sign waivers hastily. Preserve all evidence. Key factors: (1) No firm contact without lawyer; (2) Timeline notes; (3) No social posts. Act within limits. Get independent advice fast.
